headline: American Express (AXP): An Analysis of The Role of AI and Payment Systems
summary: Bretton Capital Management, an investment management company, released the “Bretton Fund” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In the volatile market, the Bretton Fund, which consists of 18 stocks, returned -9.06% in the quarter compared to -4.33% for the S&P 500 Index. American Express was the leading performance […]

headline: Amex Gold Mining Advances Bulk Sample Construction
summary: Montreal, Quebec--(Newsfile Corp. - July 6, 2026) - Amex Gold Mining Inc. (TSXV: AMX) (FSE: MX0) (OTCQX: AMXEF) ("Amex" or the "Company") is pleased to provide an update on ongoing construction and development activities related to the 40,000-tonne underground bulk sample program at its wholly-owned Perron Gold Project located in the Abitibi region of Quebec.Figure 1: Site overviewTo view an enhanced version of this graphic, please...

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on American Express, Raises Price Target to $380
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst John Pancari   maintains American Express (NYSE:AXP) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $345 to $380.
